content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 9, 2005

Ramona Wohl
Eric Miller
Eric Miller Architects
157 Grand Avenue, Suite 105
Pacific Grove, CA 93950
Via Fax: 831/372-7840

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-155

Dear Ms. Wohl and Mr. Miller:

As we noted in our August 12, 2005 letter, the Commission declines to provide written advice with respect to questions that relate to past conduct. (See § 83114(b); reg. 18329(b)(8)(A)&(C).). Consequently, before we could respond to your request for advice, we needed to confirm that no past conduct had occurred.

Since the August 12, 2005, letter to you, we have not received any additional information. This letter is written notification that we have withdrawn the above-captioned request for advice.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division
